name: Aisha
notes: Aisha is in week four, remote, and has started driving planning threads, but she still looks uncertain in cross-functional meetings when priorities conflict. I need to understand what is still unclear around decision rights, partner expectations, and how to run alignment without over-indexing on consensus. She has good energy, but I do not want her spending it decoding unspoken norms. This meeting should surface the specific friction points and translate them into practical support and clearer boundaries.
